Question asks largest brain RELATIVE to body size; sperm whale is largest in absolute terms only. Answer label even says '(largest overall)'. Dolphins have far larger brain-to-body ratios.
Kodiak bear rivals or exceeds polar bear in size and is frequently cited as largest. Answer is at minimum ambiguous.
Darwin proposing natural selection is elementary school knowledge, clearly misplaced at T5
